params.name: Cyclops God Head
params.description: This large, one-eyed skull came from an exceptionally powerful Cyclops. According to the information collected in his Domain, he was undoubtedly a god. However, an unknown energy struck him when he was dining. The god died on the spot. Eventually, his head was taken away, becoming part of a collection.
